name: Doghouse
description: Adds a tiny doghouse to Agent Town with a dog that wanders around the map.
keywords: The doghouse appears on the map automatically.
The town dog leaves the doghouse and wanders nearby while the map is open.

access.label: Agent Town companion
access.detail: Uses only the local Agent Town canvas. No setup, network access, or credentials are required.

steps.title: Open Agent Town
steps.detail: The doghouse appears on the map automatically.

steps.title: Watch the patrol
steps.detail: The town dog leaves the doghouse and wanders nearby while the map is open.

agentGuide.summary: Use Doghouse when work involves the decorative Agent Town doghouse or roaming dog animation.
useCases: Verify Agent Town decorative sprites render correctly.
Adjust the doghouse placement or dog patrol route.
Check that map hit areas still open the Doghouse building panel.
